name: data-warehouse-analytics-data-retention-enforcer
description: T186 DataRetentionEnforcer — RETENTION archetype. MANDATORY order: legal-hold-check(1)→approval-token-validate(2)→governance-enforce(3)→purge(4). DataPurged contains tombstoneRef ONLY — prohibited: rawContent/content/payload. F424 PLATFORM-ONLY.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: MANDATORY 4-step order (legal-hold→approval→governance→purge), DataPurged has tombstoneRef ONLY (no rawContent/payload), F424 PLATFORM-ONLY no bypass
Retrieve RETENTION arch pattern + legal-hold-gate + approval-token + governance-enforce + tombstone-ref patterns for T186

Break T186 into: 1-legal-hold-check (abort if hold active) → 2-approval-token-validate → 3-F424-governance-enforce → 4-purge data → emit DataPurged with tombstoneRef ONLY (NEVER include rawContent/content/payload)

Generate data-retention-enforcer.service.ts — triggered by RetentionPolicyTriggered event. MANDATORY order immutable: (1) legalHoldCheck — abort with LEGAL_HOLD_ACTIVE if hold found, (2) approvalTokenValidate — reject invalid tokens, (3) F424 IGovernanceEnforcementService (PLATFORM-ONLY, no bypass), (4) purge records. DataPurged event contains tombstoneRef field ONLY — NEVER rawContent, content, or payload fields.
Named check validation: legal_hold_check_step1, approval_token_step2, f424_governance_step3, purge_step4, data_purged_tombstone_only, no_raw_content_in_event
Score generated code 0-100 against T186 iron rules: mandatory 4-step order, tombstoneRef only in event, F424 no-bypass, legal hold abort
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=mandatory-4-step-order+tombstone-ref-only+f424-no-bypass, rejected=reordered-steps OR rawContent-in-purged-event OR f424-bypass OR missing-legal-hold-check. curriculumTier=2.
